data.title: TikTok Users Call On Trump To 'Deliver Immediately' On His 'Promise' To Save App From US Ban: 'We Don't Need The Supreme Court To…'
data.description: TikTok creators are leading an online campaign aimed at convincing President-elect Donald Trump to stop the impending ban.

data.title: 'Steve Jobs Invented The iPhone And Now They're Just...Sitting On It:' Mark Zuckerberg Hints At Apple's Potential Downfall Amid iPhone Maker's 'Random Rules'
data.description: Mark Zuckerberg, the CEO of Meta (NASDAQ: META), on Friday criticized Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) for its lack of innovation and restrictive policies. He also hinted at the potential downfall of the tech giant if it doesn't adapt to the rapidly changing industry.

data.title: Trump Organization Unveils Ethics Plan To Distance President-Elect Donald Trump From Operations
data.description: The Trump Organization announced an ethics plan that will see Donald Trump distancing himself from the company's day-to-day operations.

data.title: Mark Zuckerberg Says Biden Officials Berated Meta Staff As They Refused To Remove 'True' Content: 'It Just Got To This Point...That's Ridiculous'
data.description: Zuckerberg has admitted that officials from the Biden administration have been exerting pressure on Meta staff to remove specific content.

data.title: Apple CEO Tim Cook Took Home $74.6 Million In 2024, Up 18% Despite AI And Siri Privacy Controversies
data.description: Apple CEO Tim Cook saw a increase in his annual compensation, despite the company facing controversies over its AI, Siri privacy policies.
